author: David V. Kimball
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Link selected text to any note, keeping it as the display text.

manifest.author: David V. Kimball
manifest.description: Link selected text to any note, keeping it as the display text.
manifest.name: Link As

name: Link As

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Initial release.

Link selected or typed text to any note, keeping it as the display text. Inline links only — never writes to the target note's properties. Property Over File Name aware.
